positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic cosmic fox (kitsune) silhouette, glowing with bioluminescent sapphire and emerald accents. The fox is depicted sitting upright in a serene, ethereal forest clearing, surrounded by swirling nebula particles and stylized cherry blossoms. The style should be high-contrast, vector-art inspired, incorporating clean line work and negative space. Composition should be centered, making the fox the primary focal point. Lighting should be dramatic, emphasizing the glowing fox against a deep, starry indigo and teal background. Suitable for a modern t-shirt print, vibrant and impactful.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, blurry, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, grainy
